fields.name: Capacity No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of an existing machine center or work center to assign finite loading to.

fields.name: Capacity Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity type to apply finite loading to.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the work center or machine center associated with the capacity number on this line.

fields.name: Critical Load %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the available capacity of a work center or machine center to apply load to. Operations on work centers or machine centers that are set up as constrained resources will always be planned serially. This means that if a constrained resource has multiple capacities, then those capacities can only be planned in sequence, not in parallel as they would be if the work or machine center was not set up as a constrained resource. In a constrained resource, the Capacity field on the work center or machine center is greater than 1.

fields.name: Dampener (% of Total Capacity)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tolerance as a percent that you will allow the critical load percent to be exceeded for this work or machine center.

fields.name: Work Center No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the work center that is constrained.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Work Shift Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies any work shift filter that is set on the capacity-restrained machine or work center.

fields.name: Capacity (Effective)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the effective capacity of this capacity-constrained machine or work center.
The effective capacity is the result of multiplying the value in the Capacity (Total) field by the value in the Efficiency field.

fields.name: Prod. Order Need Qty.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the calculated capacity requirements for production orders at this capacity-constrained work center.
For more information, see the Prod. Order Need (Qty.) field on the work center.

fields.name: Prod. Order Need Qty. for Plan
Work Center Load Qty. for Plan
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.
